languages.text: "Я отказываюсь". {n}Паскаль предостерегающе поднимает {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}мехадендрит{/g}.{/n} "Решение ведет к неразрешимому конфликту, сотрудничество невозможно".

traits.locale_text: "Неоптимальное решение, Лорд-капитан". {n}Паскаль предостерегающе поднимает {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}механодендрит{/g}.{/n} "Оно ведет к неразрешимому конфликту".
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "I refuse." {n}Pasqal raises a {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} in warning.{/n} "This decision leads to an irresolvable conflict. Cooperation is impossible."
languages.original_text: "Я отказываюсь". {n}Паскаль предостерегающе поднимает {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}мехадендрит{/g}.{/n} "Решение ведет к неразрешимому конфликту, сотрудничество невозможно".

languages.text: "Abgelehnt." {n}Pasqal hebt warnend einen {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g}.{/n} "Diese Entscheidung mündet in einen unlösbaren Konflikt. Eine Kooperation ist unmöglich."
languages.original_text: "I refuse." {n}Pasqal raises a {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} in warning.{/n} "This decision leads to an irresolvable conflict. Cooperation is impossible."

traits.locale_text: "Abgelehnt." {n}Pasqal hebt warnend einen {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g}.{/n} "Diese Entscheidung mündet in einen unlösbaren Konflikt. Eine Kooperation ist unmöglich."

languages.text: « Je refuse. » {n}Pasqal brandit une {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrite{/g} en guise d'avertissement.{/n} « Cette décision conduit à un conflit insoluble. Toute coopération est impossible. »
languages.original_text: "I refuse." {n}Pasqal raises a {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} in warning.{/n} "This decision leads to an irresolvable conflict. Cooperation is impossible."

traits.locale_text: « Je refuse. » {n}Pasqal brandit une {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrite{/g} en guise d'avertissement.{/n} « Cette décision conduit à un conflit insoluble. Toute coopération est impossible. »

languages.text: “我拒绝。”{n}帕斯卡举起一根{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}机械触须{/g}以示警告。{/n}“这项决定会导致不可调和的冲突。合作绝无可能。”
languages.original_text: "I refuse." {n}Pasqal raises a {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} in warning.{/n} "This decision leads to an irresolvable conflict. Cooperation is impossible."

traits.locale_text: “我拒绝。”{n}帕斯卡举起一根{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}机械触须{/g}以示警告。{/n}“这项决定会导致不可调和的冲突。合作绝无可能。”

languages.text: «Me niego». {n}Pasqal levanta una {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendrita{/g} a modo de advertencia.{/n} «Esta decisión conllevaría un conflicto irresoluble. La cooperación es imposible».
languages.original_text: "I refuse." {n}Pasqal raises a {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} in warning.{/n} "This decision leads to an irresolvable conflict. Cooperation is impossible."

traits.locale_text: «Me niego». {n}Pasqal levanta una {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendrita{/g} a modo de advertencia.{/n} «Esta decisión conllevaría un conflicto irresoluble. La cooperación es imposible».

languages.text: 断る{n}パスカルは{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}メカデンドライト{/g} を掲げて警告する。{/n}「この決断は解決不可能な対立を招く。協力は不可能だ」。
languages.original_text: "I refuse." {n}Pasqal raises a {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} in warning.{/n} "This decision leads to an irresolvable conflict. Cooperation is impossible."

languages.text: "Reddediyorum." {n}Pasqal, bir {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mekadentritini{/g} uyarı niteliğinde kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bu karar, çözülemez bir çatışmaya yol açar. İş birliği imkânsız."
languages.original_text: "I refuse." {n}Pasqal raises a {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrite{/g} in warning.{/n} "This decision leads to an irresolvable conflict. Cooperation is impossible."
